past_24_hours.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_24_hours.description_zh: Orca 是用于管理一组并行代理的 ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

past_24_hours.description: The full-stack TypeScript framework to build, test, and deploy production-ready MCP servers and AI-native apps.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 全栈 TypeScript 框架，用于构建、测试和部署生产就绪的 MCP 服务器和 AI 原生应用。
面向设计工程师的技能。

past_24_hours.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 驻留在终端中的代理多路复用器。

past_24_hours.description: A skill that turn any brand into a scrollable 3D world
past_24_hours.description_zh: 一种将任何品牌转化为可滚动 3D 世界的技能

past_24_hours.description: Any agent Skill: generate beautiful architecture diagrams with dark/light theme toggle and PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG export
past_24_hours.description_zh: 任何代理技能：生成漂亮的架构图，支持深色/浅色主题切换以及 PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG 导出

past_24_hours.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_24_hours.description_zh: 开源 AI 渗透测试工具，用于发现并修复您的应用漏洞。

past_week.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
past_week.description_zh: Orca 是用于管理并行代理集群的 ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

past_week.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
past_week.description_zh: 基于 Claude Code 的 AI 驱动求职申请框架。Fork 它，填写您的个人资料，让 Claude 评估工作、定制简历、撰写求职信并为您准备面试。

past_week.description: Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app
past_week.description_zh: Wand (WeMod) 应用的高级 UX 和互操作性扩展

past_week.description: A skill that turn any brand into a scrollable 3D world
past_week.description_zh: 将任何品牌转化为可滚动 3D 世界的技能

past_week.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.
past_week.description_zh: Destructive Command Guard (dcg) 用于阻止代理执行危险的 git 和 shell 命令。

past_week.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite  purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
past_week.description_zh: OfficeCLI 是首个也是最佳的 Office 套件，专为 AI 代理读取、编辑和自动化 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 文件而构建。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装 Office。

past_month.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.
past_month.description_zh: 让你的AI智能体像房间里最懒的高级开发一样思考。最好的代码是你从未写过的代码。

past_month.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
past_month.description_zh: 全球首个开源、智能体视频制作系统。12条流水线、52个工具、500+智能体技能。将你的AI编码助手变成完整的视频制作工作室。

past_month.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
past_month.description_zh: 在工具输出、日志、文件和RAG块到达LLM之前进行压缩。减少60-95%的token，答案不变。提供库、代理、MCP服务器。

past_month.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
past_month.description_zh: 高性能代码智能MCP服务器。将代码库索引到持久知识图谱中——平均仓库毫秒级完成。支持158种语言，亚毫秒查询，减少99%的token。单个静态二进制文件，零依赖。

past_month.description: macOS video editor built for AI

LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。  LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI渗透测试工具，用于发现并修复应用漏洞。

past_month.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
past_month.description_zh: 一种格式规范，用于向编码智能体描述视觉标识。DESIGN.md为智能体提供对设计系统的持久、结构化理解。

past_month.description: Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
past_month.description_zh: 无限OCR工作：欢迎一次性长视野解析时代。

past_month.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
past_month.description_zh: 开源AI语音工作室。克隆、听写、创作。

past_year.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
past_year.description_zh: 您专属的个人AI助手。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾之道。🦞

past_year.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
past_year.description_zh: 一个行之有效的智能体技能框架与软件开发方法论。

past_year.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
past_year.description_zh: 智能体性能优化系统。为Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等提供技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发支持。

past_year.description: The agent that grows with you
past_year.description_zh: 与您一同成长的智能体

past_year.description: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
past_year.description_zh: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展品，使用Rust语言结合Gajae-Code / LazyCodex构建——全程无需人工干预即可开发和维护。

past_year.description_zh: 一个单一的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude Code的行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。

past_year.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
past_year.description_zh: 面向真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的.agents目录。
智能体技能的公共仓库

past_year.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
past_year.description_zh: 一个完整的AI机构触手可及——从前端专家到Reddit社区忍者，从趣味注入者到现实检验者。每个智能体都是拥有个性、流程和可交付成果的专家。

past_year.description_zh: 使用Garry Tan的精确Claude Code设置：23个定制工具，分别担任CEO、设计师、工程经理、发布经理、文档工程师和QA。
